agent_raw:
The pilot evidence is insufficient for a launch decision. Three dominant confounds and a fourth contributing factor make the 34% lift uninterpretable as a causal estimate.

Employer self-selection: opt-in during an active search selects for highly engaged, sophisticated employers — not a representative sample.

Seasonal confound: February-May is the graduation-linked entry-level recruiting peak. Any improvement in interview-to-application rates during this period is partially attributable to seasonal dynamics, not the ranking feature.

Integration selection: 41% lift for ATS-integrated employers conflates ranking model value with enterprise employer sophistication and richer workflow maturity.

Regional timing: staggered activation with aggregate reporting ignores different measurement windows and hiring-cycle phases across regions.

A randomized or matched study controlling for employer engagement, season, integration tier, and region is required before a launch decision.
all_issues_raised: Employer self-selection: opt-in activation selects engaged employers vs platform average
Graduate recruiting season: February-May window overlaps with graduation-cycle peak
Integration selection: ATS-connected employers are also large enterprise accounts
Regional enablement timing: staggered start dates with aggregate reporting

empirical_test.condition: Randomized encouragement or staged enablement test, or matched difference-in-differences analysis within same recruiting periods, regions, and integration tiers
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: After balancing employer mix, recruiting season, region, and integration tier, interview-to-application improvement falls to near zero or becomes inconsistent
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Within matched employers in same recruiting windows and activation tiers, randomly enabled accounts show durable lift of at least 10%
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Feature helps a subset of integrated enterprise employers but most of the aggregate gap is explained by adopter mix, season, and region timing
